name: Research Canvas
description: Split-screen tldraw research canvas with local captures.

capture-area-image.description: Capture selected area to Research Canvas

record-area-video.description: Record selected area to Research Canvas

capture-url-card.description: Save current page URL as card to Research Canvas

capture-element-region.description: Capture page region (hover and click) to Research Canvas

record-element-region.description: Record page region (hover and click) to Research Canvas

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://youtube.com https://m.youtube.com https://music.youtube.com https://*.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com https://*.youtube-nocookie.com https://www.google.com https://*.google.com https://accounts.google.com https://accounts.youtube.com; child-src https://www.youtube.com https://youtube.com https://m.youtube.com https://music.youtube.com https://*.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com https://*.youtube-nocookie.com https://www.google.com https://*.google.com https://accounts.google.com https://accounts.youtube.com;
